text:
Jack had an old, quirky computer that he named Winston. Every morning, he'd hop on and look forward to reading the news, listening to music, or whatever quirky thing struck his fancy.

One day, Winston came alive with a message. "Jack," it said, "I've decided we should go on an adventure!”

Jack was thrilled. He gathered his things and set off through the woods to Winston's new home.

They journeyed through fields of flowers that sparkled like diamonds. They crossed rivers that sang songs. Occasionally, they'd come across other characters who thanked them for their friendship.

Their adventure led them to a mountain so big it looked like a cloud rolling downhill. It smelled like wild berries, and Winston insisted they climb it to get a good view.

After overcoming some tiny forest animals that didn't want them there, Jack reached the top.

From there, they could see miles and miles of blue sky.

"Look!" Winston exclaimed. "The Endless Sky!"
